metadata.title: Generate a blueprint design document for a Middle East finance operator using the market_lens framework, with explicit validation gates and SR8-compilable structure.

mission.primary_objective: Generate a blueprint design document for a Middle East finance operator using the market_lens framework, with explicit validation gates and SR8-compilable structure.
mission.success_definition: Blueprint document contains all required sections with validation gates.; Validation gates are explicitly defined and actionable.; Document is compilable by SR8 into a structured directive.; Ambiguity in input is resolved through defined clarification steps.; Output is valid JSON and passes schema validation.

in_scope.item: The blueprint must cover market analysis, regulatory compliance (local and international), risk assessment, technology stack recommendations, and operational workflow design. It must be adaptable to ambiguous or incomplete input data.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Blueprint document contains all required sections with validation gates.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are explicitly defined and actionable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Document is compilable by SR8 into a structured directive.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Ambiguity in input is resolved through defined clarification steps.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: Output is valid JSON and passes schema validation.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.orchestration_goal: Generate a blueprint design document for a Middle East finance operator using the market_lens framework, with explicit validation gates and SR8-compilable structure.

routing_rules.item: Must comply with SR8 sovereign core validation rules.
All sections must be present and non-empty: objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract.
Must include explicit validation gates for each section.
Must handle depth_tier_ambiguity by requiring clarification steps before proceeding.
Output must be in strict JSON format without markdown fences.
Must not include any legal, medical, financial, or compliance advice; only structural and procedural guidance.

blocked_state.item: Stop, record blocker, and request repair.

SRXML_Artifact.final_report_contract: format: JSON; required_fields: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent; compiled_intent_structure: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: array of strings; Success Criteria: array of strings; Output Contract: object with format and required_fields; validation_gates: Gate 1: Confirm all required fields are present and non-null.; Gate 2: Verify compiled_intent contains all five sections.; Gate 3: Ensure no prohibited content (legal/medical/financial/compliance advice).; Gate 4: Validate JSON structure against schema.; Gate 5: Check for ambiguity markers and require clarification if present.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
